panels.description: Wide establishing shot of a Victorian study, warm amber lighting, focus on a miniature brass time machine model on a desk. The Narrator is looking down at it, pensive.

bubbles.text: The serious people were never sure of him. Like trusting a nursery to eggshell china. I remained preoccupied with the model, discussing the candle trick with the Medical Man.

panels.description: Medium shot of the drawing-room. The Medical Man stands by a roaring fireplace, holding a note and his pocket watch. Other guests are beginning to assemble in the background.

bubbles.text: It's rather odd. He's unavoidably detained. He asks me to lead off with dinner at seven.

panels.description: Medium shot showing the dinner table. The Editor, the Psychologist, and the shy man with a beard are seated. The atmosphere is formal and slightly awkward.
characters: Quiet, shy man with a beard

bubbles.text: It seems a pity to let the dinner spoil.

panels.description: Close-up of the dining room door slowly creaking open. The Narrator's face is in the foreground, eyes wide, staring at the dark hallway beyond the door. Shadows are cast long across the floor.

bubbles.text: I was in the midst of a joke when the door from the corridor opened, slowly and without noise. I saw it first.
